service.provider: City of Peoria Planning and Zoning Division

notes: This configuration resolves City of Peoria base zoning by intersecting coordinates with Layer 20 of the official public Peoria Zoning map service.
The configured test coordinate at the Peoria Sports Complex resolves to PAD; the published record also identifies case Z93-16A.16 and ordinance 2022-13.
The official layer publishes the zoning code, case number, ordinance number, document link, prior Maricopa County zoning, and acreage, but it does not publish a zoning description.
DOCLINK may point to a general City resource rather than a parcel-specific case document and must be reviewed before being treated as the governing instrument.
Peoria extends into both Maricopa and Yavapai counties; the incorporated parcel jurisdiction controls selection of this configuration.
PAD, PCD, and PUD properties may have separately published subzone and development-standard information that is not resolved by this base-zoning layer.

A resolved zoning result supports permit research but does not replace review of applicable cases, ordinances, planned-area documents, subzones, stipulations, overlays, or confirmation by the City of Peoria.
